testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Expected status code 200 but got 422 Response body: {"status":"FAILURE","requestId":"7f667ee2-dca9-4d41-9961-1c7a71e4ff53","datetime":"05-04-2026 21:55:36","error":{"errorInfo":"err.empty"}} expected [200] but found [422]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected status code 200 but got 422 Response body: {"status":"FAILURE","requestId":"7f667ee2-dca9-4d41-9961-1c7a71e4ff53","datetime":"05-04-2026 21:55:36","error":{"errorInfo":"err.empty"}} expected [200] but found [422] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:110) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1413) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:149) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:131) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1240) at stepDefinitions.ApiLoginStepDefinitions.apiResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(ApiLoginStepDefinitions.java:48) at ✽.API response status code should be 200(file:///Users/yusuf/software/test/CucumberProjects/selenium-project-main/src/test/resources/Features/ApiLogin.feature:7)
